_note: Maps user-facing ESC protocol names to iNAV CLI set motor_pwm_protocol values. Verified against iNAV 9.x CLI.

DSHOT600.notes: Fastest DShot variant. Recommended for F4/F7/H7 FCs with capable ESCs. Enable bidirectional for RPM telemetry and notch filtering.

DSHOT300.notes: Digital, half speed of DSHOT600. Better for longer cable runs or slower MCU timers.

DSHOT150.notes: Slowest DShot variant. Use only if DSHOT300/600 doesn't work on your hardware.

MULTISHOT.notes: Analog high-speed protocol (25–95µs). No bidirectional/telemetry. Requires MULTISHOT-capable ESCs.

ONESHOT125.notes: Analog (125–250µs). Widely compatible. Good fallback for older ESCs.

PWM.notes: Standard 1000–2000µs PWM. Universal compatibility. Slowest update rate. Use as a last resort.
